message:
perf(raptorq): binary search peeling removal + remove dead eliminate_into

Replace linear retain() with binary_search + remove in both peel() and
peel_with_proof() — terms are sorted by column index so O(log n) lookup
is correct.  Remove the unused eliminate_into method (Gaussian elimination
uses the flat dense matrix path, not sparse Equation ops).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
